# Maintainability audit

Automated audit of giant files, route SRP violations, direct Discord sends, manual JSON row mapping, limit/days clamp duplication, git subprocess callsites, legacy SQLite references, and source-of-truth alias writes. See `scripts/audit_maintainability.py` (#1282).

Hard-gating is **enabled** for 5 checks: `giant_files`, `direct_discord_sends`, `git_subprocess_callsites`, `legacy_sqlite_refs`, `source_of_truth_alias_writes`.

| `giant_files` | 0 | YES |

## Giant files (`giant_files`)

Production Rust files in src/ with >= 1000 lines that are not listed in docs/agent-maintenance/change-surfaces.md.

_No findings._

## Direct Discord send/edit (`direct_discord_sends`)

Direct serenity send_message/edit_message/reply calls outside the outbound queue (src/services/discord/outbound/, message_outbox.rs).

_No findings._

## Manual row.try_get JSON mapping (`manual_json_row_mapping`)

row.try_get::<serde_json::Value|Json<...>>(...) callsites that should use db::row typed helpers.

_No findings._

## limit/days clamp duplication (`limit_clamp_duplication`)

Inline `clamp(1, 100)` is owned by `crate::utils::api::clamp_api_limit` and is flagged on every site outside the helper definition. Other limit/days clamp expressions are flagged when they appear in 3+ source files, signalling another shared helper candidate.

_No findings._

## Direct git subprocess callsites (`git_subprocess_callsites`)

std::process::Command::new("git") callsites outside src/services/git. Prefer the centralised git helper for consistent error handling.

_No findings._

## Legacy SQLite references (`legacy_sqlite_refs`)

rusqlite / Sqlite* / .sqlite references outside cli/migrate, compat, and db/legacy_sqlite, plus sqlite3 / agentdesk.sqlite in operational shell scripts. Surfaces fossils after the Postgres cutover.

_No findings._

## Source-of-truth alias writes (`source_of_truth_alias_writes`)

File-write callsites that touch alias paths listed in docs/source-of-truth.md. Writes should target the canonical path.

_No findings._
